kling_prompt_sections.camera: 5-second fixed in-store surveillance-style shot, slightly elevated oblique angle; customer body trajectory, dwell time, hand movement, product display, and counter area visible; face detail is helpful but not required
kling_prompt_sections.scene: a modern phone retail store with clean demo tables; visible product setup: two smartphones on security tethers near small price tags.
kling_prompt_sections.continuity: Continuing from the previous shot in the same store setting (a modern phone retail store with clean demo tables), the same single shopper is in the same position with the same products visible. No cuts, no scene change, no new people enter.
kling_prompt_sections.action_event: no salesperson appears, no staff enters, and no one speaks; the shopper remains alone with the product and decides what to do without intervention

reaction_timeline.event: Continuing from the previous shot in the same store setting (a modern phone retail store with clean demo tables), the same single shopper is in the same position with the same products visible. No cuts, no scene change, no new people enter. no salesperson appears, no staff enters, and no one speaks; the shopper remains alone with the product and decides what to do without intervention.
customer clearly steps away from the display and turns body away from the product.
gaze moves elsewhere in the store or toward the exit. hands disengage from product entirely.
walks away from the product area alone, leaving the display behind.

kling_prompt_sections.negative: no extreme overhead shot, no tiny distant customer, no occluded product area, no scene change, no new shoppers, no costume change, no product swap, no inconsistent reaction, no enum-like text, no floating labels, no UI overlays

kling_prompt:
Camera: 5-second fixed in-store surveillance-style shot, slightly elevated oblique angle; customer body trajectory, dwell time, hand movement, product display, and counter area visible; face detail is helpful but not required
Scene: a modern phone retail store with clean demo tables; visible product setup: two smartphones on security tethers near small price tags.
Continuity: Continuing from the previous shot in the same store setting (a modern phone retail store with clean demo tables), the same single shopper is in the same position with the same products visible. No cuts, no scene change, no new people enter.
Visible intervention: no salesperson appears, no staff enters, and no one speaks; the shopper remains alone with the product and decides what to do without intervention
Reaction timeline:
- 0-1s: Continuing from the previous shot in the same store setting (a modern phone retail store with clean demo tables), the same single shopper is in the same position with the same products visible. No cuts, no scene change, no new people enter. no salesperson appears, no staff enters, and no one speaks; the shopper remains alone with the product and decides what to do without intervention.
- 1-2s: customer clearly steps away from the display and turns body away from the product.
- 2-4s: gaze moves elsewhere in the store or toward the exit. hands disengage from product entirely.
- 4-5s: walks away from the product area alone, leaving the display behind.
Negative constraints: no extreme overhead shot, no tiny distant customer, no occluded product area, no scene change, no new shoppers, no costume change, no product swap, no inconsistent reaction, no enum-like text, no floating labels, no UI overlays
